scripts.test: turbo run test && pnpm run test:scripts
scripts.typecheck: turbo run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:scripts
scripts.typecheck:scripts: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --skipLibCheck --types node scripts/require-dev-env.ts scripts/require-dev-env.test.ts scripts/run-job-coach-prd.ts scripts/export-data.ts
scripts.dev:job-coach: echo 'Job Coach DEV — http://localhost:3000' && APP_ENV=development NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=development PORT=3000 pnpm --filter job-coach-web dev
scripts.db:reset:dev: APP_ENV=development pnpm tsx scripts/require-dev-env.ts && supabase db reset
scripts.db:reset:prd: APP_ENV=production pnpm tsx scripts/require-dev-env.ts && supabase db reset
